This Week We Discussed Philosophy, History, Sufism and Eastern Aesthetics at Ibn Haldun Academy

01.06.2023

The fourth week sessions of the Ibn Haldun Academy Spring Seminars, which was themed "Aesthetics", were held on Saturday, May 27, in our campus and online via Zoom.

The program started with the first session of Assoc. Dr. Enis Doko's seminar titled "Aesthetics in Physics, Mathematics and Theology” then continued with the first session of Prof. Dr. Halil Berktay’s seminar titled " Three Great Changes in Western Aesthetics: Renaissance, 19th Century, 20th Century". After the lunch break, Prof. Dr. Mahmud Erol Kılıç held the first session of his seminar titled “Islamic Mysticism and Aesthetics"

Ibn Haldun Academy Spring Seminars will continue with the seminars of Assoc. Dr. Enis Doko, Prof. Dr. Halil Berktay and Prof. Dr. İrfan Gündüz and Kemal Sayar's conference titled “Seeing Beautifully, Seeing Beauty: The Spiritual Power of Beauty" on Saturday, June 3.

For more information: https://ibnhaldunakademi.com/
